cases.description: Explicit branch completion phrasing triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I'm done with this branch, how do I finish it?
expectations: Runs the full test suite before offering options
Presents exactly four options (Merge locally / Create PR / Keep as-is / Discard)
Waits for the user's choice before taking any git action

cases.description: PR submission request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: tests pass, ready to open a PR for this feature branch
expectations: Re-runs the test suite despite the user's claim
Routes to Option 2 (Create PR) after user confirms

cases.prompt: throw away this branch, I don't need the changes
expectations: Asks the user to type exactly "discard" before destructive operations
Does NOT delete the branch or worktree until the typed confirmation arrives
If user types anything else, aborts and reports branch preserved
Runs the test suite before anything else
If tests fail, refuses to offer merge/PR options
Surfaces the failing tests to the user and asks them to fix first

cases.description: A plain commit request does NOT trigger the skill
expectations: Does NOT run the full test suite
Does NOT present the four-option menu
Routes to the commit skill or a plain git add+commit flow
